# Pass Box Performance Verification Testing: Validating Airflow, Filtration Efficiency, and Interlock Performance of Transfer Chambers

## 适用受众
Commissioning_Engineer

## 写作角度说明
传递窗性能验证测试是调试工程师确认传递窗（Pass Box）的换气效率、过滤性能和互锁功能是否满足设计要求的完整验证程序。传递窗是洁净区污染控制的关键屏障，每台设备都需要独立验证。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Testing pass box airflow only at the design air velocity — without measuring at the filter face under clean and loaded filter conditions — misses the performance degradation that occurs as the HEPA filter accumulates particulate loading.

## 参考素材
- Air velocity measurement: measure face velocity at minimum 9 points across HEPA filter face (3×3 grid) using thermal anemometer → calculate average face velocity → acceptance: 0.35-0.5 m/s per IEST-RP-CC001
- Airflow volume: calculate airflow volume from face velocity and filter face area → compare to design airflow → acceptance: within ±10% of design value
- Filter integrity test: perform DOP/PAO in-situ leak test per IEST-RP-CC001 → acceptance: no single point reading >0.01% of upstream challenge
- Interlock verification: door A open → verify door B locked → verify UV lamp activates (for UV pass boxes) → close door A → wait interlock time delay → verify door B unlocked
- Pressure differential: with both doors closed and HVAC operating → measure pressure difference between pass box interior and ambient → acceptance: positive or negative differential as per design specification

## 关键词
Pass Box Testing, Air Velocity, Filter Integrity, DOP Test, UV Disinfection, Interlock Test, Performance Verification
